vocab.example: I find that looking out the car window offers a fleeting spectacle of life that you just can't capture if you're staring at a phone.

vocab.meaning: mở ra/diễn ra ngay trước mắt
vocab.example: There's something incredibly poetic about watching a mountain range slowly unfold before your eyes as the bus climbs the pass.

vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi về địa lý/địa hình
vocab.example: I am fascinated by the geographical shifting from arid plains to coastal wetlands during long road trips.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên một tâm trạng trầm tư/suy nghĩ sâu sắc
vocab.example: The rhythmic movement of the vehicle combined with the passing greenery tends to evoke a pensive mood in me.

vocab.meaning: những công trình kiến trúc đẹp xuất hiện chớp nhoáng
vocab.example: When the bus passes through old towns, I keep my eyes peeled for fleeting architectural gems that most people overlook.

vocab.meaning: sự kích thích về thị giác
vocab.example: I prefer the natural visual stimulation of the countryside over the artificial glare of a digital screen.

vocab.meaning: điều kiện ánh sáng huyền ảo/thanh tao
vocab.example: During the 'golden hour', the ethereal lighting conditions transform even the most mundane fields into a masterpiece.

vocab.meaning: phá vỡ sự đơn điệu/nhàm chán
vocab.example: Observing the changing landscape is the best way to break the monotony of a six-hour coach journey.

vocab.meaning: thiên nhiên thuần khiết/không bị tác động
vocab.example: Traveling through the highlands gives me a rare chance to witness unadulterated nature in its rawest form.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác về sự nhất thời/phù du
vocab.example: Watching the world rush by through a glass pane creates a strange sense of transience that I find quite moving.
